etymology.description: ĺ”Ż(ĺ”Ż) (wĂ©i, "only") + éłĄ(éłĄ) (niÇŽo, "bird") = phonetic ĺ”Ż with semantic éłĄ added -> cry of a bird
etymology.interpretation: The character é·•(é·•) (yÇŽo, "cry of a bird") combines ĺ”Ż(ĺ”Ż) (wĂ©i, "only") as the phonetic component with éłĄ(éłĄ) (niÇŽo, "bird") indicating the character's meaning related to birds, specifically the cries they make.
